rate_limit_note: Script enforces at least 4.2 seconds between Gemini requests to stay under 15 requests per minute.
english_article: Old Man Tiber, a seasoned fisherman, always said the best time to fish was just before dawn. He’d wake up while the world was still draped in shadows, a quiet stillness hanging over the lake. His small wooden boat, affectionately nicknamed 'The Wanderer', would glide across the water, barely disturbing the surface. He often caught silverfish, sometimes a plump carp, and occasionally, a magnificent pike. Tiber believed the early morning light held a certain magic, a peaceful energy that attracted the fish and calmed his spirit. He’d share his catch with the village, always offering a kind word and a warm smile.
chinese_text: 老人 渔夫 黎明 宁静 湖面 船 银鱼 鲤鱼 梭鱼 光芒 能量 精神 村庄 赠送 微笑 影子 魔法 捕捞 漂浮 温暖
mixed_article: 老人 Tiber, a seasoned 渔夫, always said the best time to fish was 黎明. He’d wake up while the world was still draped in 影子, a 宁静 hanging over the 湖面. His small wooden 船, affectionately nicknamed 'The Wanderer', would 漂浮 across the water, barely disturbing the surface. He often caught 银鱼, sometimes a plump 鲤鱼, and occasionally, a magnificent 梭鱼. Tiber believed the early morning 光芒 held a certain 魔法, a peaceful 能量 that attracted the fish and calmed his 精神. He’d 赠送 his catch with the 村庄, always offering a kind word and a 温暖 微笑.
